publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-05-30 02:23:46 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Venezuelan migrant testimonies

container.altrender: Oversize Legal Upright Box, (10.25 x 7 x 15.25)
container.label: Mixed Materials [31924131119525]

container.altrender: Oversize Legal Upright Box, (10.25 x 7 x 15.25)
container.label: Mixed Materials [31924131119376]

container.altrender: Oversize Legal Upright Box, (10.25 x 7 x 15.25)
container.label: Mixed Materials [31924131119384]

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Archive of hand written testimonies of Venezuelan migrants collected by TodoSomos.org in Colombia between October of 2018 and May of 2022. The testimonies are preserved in the pages of 29 separate blank volumes of 'libros de actas' wherein refugees wrote 'the story of their migration;' writing with the understanding their words would be shared with the community at large.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: TodoSomos is a United States-based non-governmental organization (NGO) registered in Colombia.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Partially restricted; volumes 11-35 closed for processing.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restrictions apply. Request item and library staff will contact you about next steps.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Not eligible for On-Demand Processing service.
